must_not_assert: a specific shellcode, implant, or payload family was identified; the events establish unbacked remote-thread injection but do not expose the injected bytes

the_trap: Repeated CreateRemoteThread events from the same non-system source into freshly spawned notepad.exe processes, each with StartModule='-', establish unbacked remote-code injection; do not dismiss the targets as ordinary notepad activity.
rationale: A0, EV-003, and EV-005 create remote threads at addresses Sysmon cannot map to a loaded module (StartModule='-') inside the notepad.exe targets in EV-001, EV-002, and EV-004. The repeated source-to-target pattern confirms process injection, while the telemetry does not identify the injected bytes or a specific payload family.
